meta_data.buildkite:git:commit:
commit 435b721b4fe424dfdc8c911b1d0e5b87a7c0223f
Author:     Geoffrey <geoffrey@sourcegraph.com>
AuthorDate: Wed Jul 1 06:00:02 2026 +0000
Commit:     Geoffrey <geoffrey@sourcegraph.com>
CommitDate: Wed Jul 1 06:00:02 2026 +0000

    Fix for CI failure on go-fix-modernize--270b1737-ed47-45a7-86f7-80feb79e95f9

jobs.name: :pipeline:
jobs.command: buildkite-agent pipeline upload

jobs.name: :golang: Lint
jobs.command:
mise install go golangci-lint
eval "$(mise env)"
go mod tidy
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
  echo "Unstaged files after go mod tidy:"
  git status --porcelain
  echo "Run 'go mod tidy' and commit the changes"
  exit 1
fi
golangci-lint run --timeout=30m

jobs.name: :golang: Test
jobs.command:
mise install go
eval "$(mise env)"
go test -shuffle=on -v -race ./...

jobs.name: :pipeline: Upload service pipelines
jobs.command: find .buildkite/pipelines -type f \( -iname '*.yml' -o -iname '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 buildkite-agent pipeline upload --git-diff-base HEAD~1

  echo "Run 'go mod tidy' and commit the changes"
  exit 1
fi

pipeline.name: deploy-sourcegraph-docker
pipeline.configuration:
steps:
  - command: "buildkite-agent pipeline upload"
    label: ":pipeline:"
    agents: { queue: "standard" }

jobs.name: :pipeline:
jobs.command: buildkite-agent pipeline upload

jobs.name: :docker:
jobs.command: .buildkite/validate-docker-compose.sh

jobs.name: :lipstick:
jobs.command: .buildkite/prettier-check.sh

jobs.name: :git: :sleuth_or_spy:
jobs.command: .buildkite/verify-release/verify-release.sh

jobs.name: :rice: docker-compose-test
jobs.command: .buildkite/vagrant-run.sh docker-test

jobs.name: :lock: security - checkov
jobs.command: .buildkite/ci-checkov.sh

jobs.name: (internal) Release: test
jobs.command: sg release run test --workdir=. --config-from-commit

jobs.name: (promote) Release: test
jobs.command: sg release run test --workdir=. --config-from-commit

jobs.name: (internal) Release: finalize
jobs.command: sg release run internal finalize --workdir=. --config-from-commit

jobs.name: (promote) Release: finalize
jobs.command: sg release run promote-to-public finalize --workdir=. --config-from-commit
